candidates.why: Separate operating-expense line, but not identified as cost of sales / cost of revenues and sits outside the selected COGS bucket ('Materials Purchased' + 'and change in inventory'). No explicit COGS-specific D&A row is shown, so adding this to COGS would risk misclassification/double counting across operating buckets.
Component of the D&A summary row, with no indication it belongs specifically to COGS. Inferior to the summary row and should not be chosen for COGS separately.

candidates.why: Balancing line, not an appropriate operating D&A bucket for separate COGS addition.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is shown as belonging to cost of goods sold / cost of revenues. The visible D&A appears as a separate by-nature operating expense line, so conservatively do not add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line at the same level as 'Employee benefits expense' and 'Other operating expenses'. It appears outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket rather than embedded within those selected rows, so it should be added separately later. Prefer the summary row over component rows to avoid double counting.
Component of the broader 'Depreciation and amortisation expenses' line. Do not use when the summary row exists.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are 'Employee benefits expense' and 'Other operating expenses'. 'Depreciation and amortisation expenses' is shown as a distinct same-level operating line before operating profit, so it is not embedded in those selected rows and should be added separately. No separate R&D row is visible, and no more specific SG&A-vs-COGS D&A split is provided; use the operating D&A summary row only.
